accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.introduction: Aïobi Meet is committed to making its digital services accessible, in accordance with [APPLICABLE_LAW].
accessibility.scope: This accessibility statement applies to the website meet.aiobi.world

complianceStatus.title: Compliance Status
complianceStatus.body: meet.aiobi.world is not compliant with RGAA 4.1. The site has not yet been audited. However, the team strives to create a site that is accessible to everyone by following RGAA recommendations.

improvement.title: Improvement and Contact
improvement.body: If you cannot access content or a service, you can contact the person responsible for meet.aiobi.world to be directed to an accessible alternative or to obtain the content in another form.
improvement.response: We try to respond within 2 working days.

recourse.title: Means of Recourse
recourse.introduction: This procedure is to be used in the following case: you have reported to the website manager an accessibility issue that prevents you from accessing content or one of the portal's services, and you have not received a satisfactory response.
